Business Name: ONE9 Travel Center (former Pilot Travel Center #254)
Description: ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Company's One9 Fuel Network, formerly Pilot Travel Center #254) at I-24 Exit 169 (GA-299/US-11) in Wildwood, the only full-service truck stop on I-24's short Georgia segment in Dade County. Open 24 hours with 6 diesel lanes, bulk DEF, 3 showers, CAT scale, Subway, ATM, and about 20 truck parking spaces.

Business Name: CAT Scale at ONE9 Travel Center Wildwood
Description: Certified CAT scale located at the ONE9 Travel Center (former Pilot #254) at I-24 Exit 169 (GA-299/US-11) in Wildwood, GA. Available 24 hours alongside the travel center's diesel lanes.

Business Name: Georgia I-24 Weigh / Inspection Station (Dade County)

Description: Independent 24-hour truck stop on US-45 at I-24 Exit 37 in Metropolis with 24-hour diesel, truck parking, convenience store, and on-site truck service bays offering tire, lube, and engine repair. Directories list about 15 truck parking spaces; the former on-site Huddle House restaurant closed in 2025 but the store remains open.
Super 8 motel on US-45 at I-24 Exit 37 in Metropolis that explicitly advertises free truck, bus, and RV parking for guests. Amenities include free continental breakfast, WiFi, and an indoor pool.

Business Name: Fort Massac Welcome Center / Rest Area (I-24 MM 37)
Truck Parking Club lot - 2409 IL-145 Metropolis
Truck parking only lot - 5570 S US Route 45 (former truck stop)
Keen's Truck & Trailer Repair (at Metropolis Truck Plaza)

Description: Independent BP fuel station and convenience store on IL-146 at I-24 Exit 16 in Vienna, IL. Sells diesel and has a large gravel lot used by truckers, with paid truck parking (about $10, reimbursed with an in-store purchase per driver reports on Trucker Path).
Budget hotel on IL-146 immediately off I-24 Exit 16 in Vienna, IL, with free self parking explicitly including RV, bus, and truck parking. Offers free WiFi, continental breakfast, and an indoor pool.
